_meta.title: MRA world map (reconciled, engine-compatible v3)
_meta.schema: Top-level sectors/block_to_base/y_axis_ranges are consumed by mra_stub.py WorldMap. Rich keys (coordinate_system, layout, status_legend) are human-facing and ignored by the engine.
_meta.provenance: COMMUNITY-DERIVED, NOT BINARY-VERIFIED for the (X,Y,layer)->sector mapping (MRA_GROUND_TRUTH.md s13d/s16): that mapping is absent from MRA.exe/OGN.exe/SCB.exe, so Ghidra cannot confirm it. SEC geometry & filename rules ARE binary-grounded. All coordinates trace to map_readme.txt + MRA_map.ods + sector_map.xls. Mirror this provenance in every consumer (s17 rule 2).
binary_grounded_facts: SEC files 33x33x6=6534 bytes, effective 32x32 playable (SCB FUN_00405854).
Layer transitions via terrain bytes 0x04/0x05 (SCB FUN_00407a34).
derivation_checks: Y-bridge actual_Ystart+513=ods_ycode for ALL 14 ranges; landmark-confirmed.
X-bridge prefix->MP-X agrees across 2 .xls landmark rows AND matches MRA_GROUND_TRUTH.md's independent 'MR College'=EWGB290321 finding.
sector_map.xls rendering: left-to-right prefix run is the cyclic order BECJ->CKDP->DQEV->EWGB->GCHH->HIIN->IOX->YBD, matching x_block 0..7.
FIX vs old world_map.json: old placed BECJ/CKDP/DQEV at x_block 14/15/16 (east of YBD) by reading Mike's TILED csv columns raw; v3 puts them at the verified western 0/1/2.

malformed_filenames_flagged.policy: files violating Yend=Ystart+31 are NOT remapped/placed; listed in unmapped

coordinate_system.engine_vs_mp: Engine uses x_block/y_block indices + y_axis_ranges; MP-X/Y/Z are the human-readable community coordinates layered on top.
coordinate_system.prefix_cipher_is_cyclic: The .SEC prefix cipher is cyclic, period 8, order BECJ,CKDP,DQEV,EWGB,GCHH,HIIN,IOX,YBD. sector_map.xls tiles it across Sheets A/B/C, so a prefix is only locally unique; all extant files fall in one cycle (MP-X 45..80). A fully populated world would repeat each prefix every +40 MP-X.

status_legend.filled_not_in_game: .ods #99ccff: drawn for looks, not in game
status_legend.no_map: .ods #ff0000: no map available to the cartographer
status_legend.void: behind the Veil of Darkness / not open (.ods black, or text Void/???)

unmapped.reason: Y-range violates binary invariant Yend=Ystart+31 (SCB FUN_00405854); not placed (no guess)
